arts.sum: Mohamed Salah is having a vintage season with Liverpool as they look to clinch the Premier League title, and their iconic forward has opened up on an unlikely source of inspiration

arts.ttl: 'You will pay': Mohamed Salah shares what he tells opposition defenders when they try to 'trash talk' with him
Liverpool fans fear Mohamed Salah is saying goodbye in new interview as uncertainty over future continues
arts.sum: Liverpool fans think Mo Salah has hinted at that he will be leaving Anfield at the end of the season after he appeared to give somewhat of a farewell message in a new interview.

arts.ttl: Who will replace Arne Slot on touchline while Liverpool manager serves ban?
arts.sum: Liverpool manager Arne Slot and assistant Sipke Hulshoff will serve two-game touchline bans after receiving red cards against Everton.
